697.note: Pointed to PR #701 for SSH custom port fix.

709.note: Root cause: EnterWizardErrorAsync disconnects before cancel, leaving stale server session. Fix PRs #717 and #718 submitted.

720.note: Root cause confirmed: GatewayClientFactory.Create() bootstrapPairAsNode issue. Fix PR #721 submitted.

727.note: Follow-up: reporter confirmed v0.6.3. Asked which specific step fails (pair-operator vs pair-node). Noted possible connection to #662 fix.

669.note: Draft PR submitted implementing F11/Esc fullscreen for both Canvas windows.

696.note: Documented WebSocketClientBase reconnect-loop root cause: missing connection-generation guard. Stale ListenForMessagesAsync can call ReconnectWithBackoffAsync after _reconnectLoopActive resets to 0. Fix: per-connect generation counter (as in closed PR #443 websocket-lifecycle-correctness branch).

662.note: Root cause identified: PairOperatorStep missing Windows-side health check. Fix PR submitted (pair-operator gateway health check). 248 SetupEngine tests pass.

677.note: Identified device-pair plugin not loaded in gateway CLI <2026.6.0. Workaround: upgrade to v0.6.3. Fix PR submitted.

709.note: Two duplicate PRs. #718 is preferred; #717 should be closed.

720.note: PR #721 closed by maintainer on 2026-06-10. Connection hardening covered by ranjeshj PR #741.

729.note: Guard BootstrapAsync via SetupExistingGatewayClassifier.HasAnyExistingGatewayConnection(). 996 tray tests pass. PR #735 is duplicate — should be closed.

669.note: F11/Esc fullscreen via AppWindow.SetPresenter. JS injection for WebView2 key capture. 990 tray tests pass.

662.note: Added Windows-side HTTP health check to PairOperatorStep.ExecuteAsync() before WebSocket connect (mirrors PairNodeStep pattern). 248 SetupEngine tests pass (+1 new regression test). PR #721 closed by maintainer.

SetupEngine tests: 256 pass (+10 new). Pre-existing failure: SetupContextTests.Constructor_SetsLocalDataDirFromLocalAppDataRootEnvironment (Windows path separator on Linux).

device-pair-plugin-not-found-fix-677.note: Added IsPluginNotFoundError detection in AutoApproveNodePairing + AutoApprovePairing. Returns Terminal StepResult with upgrade guidance instead of retrying. 253 tests pass.
